message:
fix: improve thread safety for ghostty operations

- Make streaming flag atomic to avoid data races between threads
- Queue panel destruction requests for main thread processing
- Control messages now queue operations instead of calling ghostty directly
- Change new tab shortcut from ⌘T to ⌘/ (⌘T used by macOS)

files.patch:
@@ -135,7 +135,7 @@
- +
